description: Developed responsive web interfaces, reusable components, and integrated APIs to create user-friendly and scalable web applications.
bullets: Developed scalable and responsive web applications using React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript following modern frontend development best practices.
Implemented component-based architecture to build modular, reusable, and maintainable UI components.
Integrated RESTful APIs and WebSocket connections to enable dynamic dashboards and real-time data updates.
Utilized Redux and Zustand for efficient state management and predictable data flow across complex applications.
Enhanced user experience through responsive UI development and optimized rendering techniques.
Improved application performance using lazy loading, code splitting, and memoization, reducing load times.
Collaborated closely with UI/UX designers and backend developers to deliver seamless and user-centric web interfaces.
Managed source code using Git, supporting version control, collaborative development, and CI/CD workflows.
Contributed to the development and enhancement of production-grade frontend applications and internal dashboards.
